146210.name: Share of fish stocks within biologically sustainable levels (FAO, 2020)
146210.description: Fish stock are subpopulations of a particular species of fish which have common parameters such as location, growth and mortality which define their population dynamics. A fish stock with abundance equal to or above the maximum sustainable yield (MSY) is classified as biologically sustainable, and not overexploited.
